class_name: Recombinant Protein, Glycoprotein or Complex Biologic
description: Recombinant protein, glycoprotein, hormone, complex biological active or product whose identity depends on expression system, higher-order structure, glycosylation, potency or manufacturing process.
mandatory_evidence: Molecular/proper name and complete primary sequence or subunit composition
Expression system, host cell, construct and cell-bank provenance
Manufacturer, manufacturing site and biological licence or GMP status
Glycosylation, post-translational modification and charge-variant profile
Intact mass, peptide mapping and orthogonal identity
Biological potency assay with qualified reference standard
Aggregation, fragments, particles and higher-order-structure controls
Host-cell proteins, residual host-cell DNA and process impurities
Formulation, container closure, cold-chain and stability evidence
Sterility, endotoxin and batch-release evidence for sterile presentation
automatic_rejection: Potency reported only as mass without bioassay
No glycosylation or aggregation control where applicable
